meta.title: StampScaner — Premium philatelic expertise worldwide
meta.description: Digital certificate signed by Aslan Kaa, valuation, marketplace, transaction insurance. AI-agent Postman — world-class philatelic expert at the service of collectors.
hero.lead: StampScaner is a premium expert service for collectors and philatelists worldwide. AI stamp recognition, valuation, founder-signed digital certificate, transaction insurance, escrow marketplace.
hero.stamp.title:
Expertise
19th–21st c.
services.title: The full collector workflow, in one place
services.lead: Every service backed by our reputation, expertise and insurance cover. Free features for everyone; premium services for those who need the document and the protection.
services.identify.title: Stamp identification
services.identify.desc: Photograph the stamp in the app — within 2 seconds you receive country, year, series, catalogue number and estimated value.
services.info.title: Full information package
services.info.desc: Detailed dossier: issue history, print run, varieties, cross-reference Scott / SG / Michel / Zagorsky, 24-month price analysis, owner recommendations.
services.cert.title: Digital certificate
services.cert.desc: Official authenticity certificate signed by the founder. In-person expertise, $1000 insurance cover, public registry record, QR verification.
services.market.title: Marketplace with escrow
services.market.desc: Buy and sell stamps with transaction protection: buyer funds held until authenticity and delivery confirmed. Premium stamp pages on stampscaner.com.
services.appraisal.title: Collection appraisal
services.appraisal.desc: From a single stamp to thousands-strong collections. Written opinion with segment breakdown and market context.
services.insurance.title: Stamp & transaction insurance
services.insurance.desc: Collection policy (theft, fire, loss in shipping) and transaction insurance (counterfeit risk, non-payment). Through licensed insurers.
postman.title:
A world-class philatelic expert.
Around the clock. In five languages.
postman.lead: Postman is our proprietary AI Agent at RDP / AIEP / FIP level. Knows the catalogues, auctions, expertise methodology, legal framework and history of philately from the 19th to the 21st century. Defends against forgeries, values, prepares documents.
postman.chat.title: Postman
postman.chat.msg1: I have an old Soviet stamp, blue, with an airplane. How can I identify it?
postman.chat.msg2: Likely from the 'USSR Air Mail' series. Photograph the face in daylight, no flash, add the reverse. I will confirm the year, print run, valuation and check for counterfeit markers. I will give a preliminary APS grade from the photo.
postman.chat.field: Describe the stamp or attach a photo...
cert.title: A document you can lean on.
cert.lead: Each certificate is an official opinion with a unique number, public registry record, and $1000 insurance cover when issued after in-person expertise and personal handover.
cert.feature1.title: Founder's signature
cert.feature1.desc: Every certificate carries Aslan Kaa's digital signature (Ed25519). Printed editions are hand-signed and notarised.
cert.feature2.title: $1000 insurance cover
cert.feature2.desc: Up to $1000 compensation if the certificate information turns out to be fully incorrect. Applies after in-person expertise and personal handover.
cert.feature3.title: Public registry + QR
cert.feature3.desc: Entry in the open registry at stampscaner.com/cert. QR code for instant verification of the certificate itself.
cert.feature4.title: APS grading
cert.feature4.desc: Condition assessed against the American Philatelic Society scale — from Superb to Poor — with face and reverse photographs.
cert.doc.title: Certificate of authenticity
cert.doc.row1.label: Stamp
cert.doc.row2.label: Year
cert.doc.row3.label: Catalogue
cert.doc.row4.label: APS grade
cert.doc.row5.label: Valuation
cert.doc.sig.name: Aslan Kaa · Founder
pricing.title: No subscriptions. Pay only for what you need.
pricing.lead: Premium service organised around one-off payments. Free features last forever; paid services billed on request. Prices shown in USD/RUB.
pricing.card1.title: Identification + base info
pricing.card2.title: Full information package
pricing.card3.title: Digital certificate · Premium
pricing.card4.title: Digital certificate · Pre-cert
trust.title: We build a service worth leaning on.
trust.lead: Legal hygiene, verifiable methodology, open registry — the three principles StampScaner stands on.
trust.item1.title: Legal sources
trust.item1.desc: Database draws from Wikidata, Wikimedia Commons (PD/CC-BY), Smithsonian Open Access, UPU WNS registry. No scraping of protected catalogues.
trust.item2.title: Open registry
trust.item2.desc: Each certificate is published at stampscaner.com/cert/<id> with a QR code. It cannot be forged or revoked silently — the record exists independent of us.
trust.item3.title: GDPR-ready
trust.item3.desc: Registered personal-data operator. Full user consent, right to erasure, encryption at rest. GDPR / 152-FZ / CCPA compliance.
trust.item4.title: Defensive expertise
trust.item4.desc: Postman does not teach how to forge — it defends against forgeries. Certificates are not issued under reasonable doubt; the fee is refunded.
founder.title: Aslan Kaa
founder.bio: Abdul-Khakim Akhmadovich Kagirov is an independent expert consultant, author and founder of digital platforms in audit, investment, cultural heritage and high-tech entrepreneurship. StampScaner is his initiative to bring world-class expertise tools to collectors worldwide.
cta.title: Ready to begin?
cta.lead: Download the app, try free identification and decide your next step — a documents package, a certificate, or the marketplace.
cta.qr: Point your phone camera at the QR code
footer.legal.disclaimer: Note: StampScaner is an independent initiative of the founder. The service is not affiliated with UPU, Scott, Stanley Gibbons, Michel, Yvert et Tellier, Colnect, StampWorld, Philately.ru or other rightsholders. Catalogue references are used for cross-reference and identification only.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Abdul-Khakim Akhmadovich Kagirov. All rights reserved.
footer.copyright.tagline: Site is hosted on the founder's own infrastructure, with no analytics or data-collection forms without explicit user consent.
